pageContext.name: Tomie (Manga Version)
pageContext.description: Animegami Studios is proud to present their latest resin collectible, Tomie 1:6 Scale Resin Statue from the worldwide hit Junji Ito Collection in the Manga Version. This is their first release from this series of products.  The successful artist Mitsuo Mori whose work consists of portraits of young women, becomes obsessed with Tomie, trying over and over again to paint her. Eventually, Tomie becomes his model. While Tomie is sitting for her portrait she tells Mori that every man who has ever loved her tried to kill her, and she doesn't know why. Mori paints Tomie but does so with a hideous demonic face merged with her own. Tomie sneers at the painting causing Mori to go into a homicidal rage, chopping her into pieces.  The base of our piece reflects precisely that, the severed body parts after Mori's rage. Tomie is then reborn from the severed parts, with her pose and attire being a reference to the photo taken outside earlier in the episode. Included is a head variant showcasing her hideous demonic face.  A full-length episode can be streamed on our Licensor website Crunchyroll.
